statement: In every magma, Equation 4368 (`x * (y * z) = y * (w * u)`) implies Equation 4356 (`x * (y * y) = z * (w * u)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0379
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op y (op w u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op y y)) = (op z (op w u))
